---
title: "Hai-lights — Hero Background"
page-layout: article
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css?v=20260421b
---

::: {.hcc-hero hcc-hero-bg}
::: {.hcc-hero-grid}
::: {.hcc-hero-copy}
<div class="hcc-kicker">Consultancy Firm</div>

<h1 class="hcc-title">Hai-lights</h1>

<p class="hcc-subtitle">
I study human perception, glare, and lighting quality, with a focus on practical
metrics and data-driven analysis for real-world environments.
</p>

<div class="hcc-cta">
<a class="hcc-button ghost" href="about/summary/">About Yulia</a>
<a class="hcc-button ghost" href="publications/">Publications</a>
</div>

<div class="hcc-social">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuliatyukhova/" target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
<a href="https://x.com/ytyukhova/" target="_blank" aria-label="X"><i class="bi bi-twitter"></i></a>
<a href="https://github.com/ytyukhova/" target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ev9KmxoAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

<div style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
<a href="index.qmd">Back to home</a>
</div>
